
# 📝 Pull Request Checklist — STG-1AI

## Compliance & Legal Verification
- [ ] KBLI/NIB/OSS status valid
- [ ] RSA signature/UBO identity diverifikasi
- [ ] Proof of Reserve (PoR) hash diperbarui
- [ ] Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) certificate diverifikasi

## Security Checklist
- [ ] SECURITY-CHECKLIST.md diperbarui
- [ ] Vulnerability scan/linting pass
- [ ] Fail-fast CI mode aktif

## Operational Readiness
- [ ] Stress-test metrics valid
- [ ] Dashboard/monitoring sinkron dengan OSS/KBLI
